sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna kuam sung tu’n lohna ding, Hong liah in!
Topa aw ka lungmuanna ding, Hong liah
Leitung minthannate inah, Ka mawhna’ng in hong zolzol a;
A kip tawntung Sungpi pha aw,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Dahna khua a hong mial lai teng, Hong liah in!
Minthan ni zing khuavak mateng, Hong liah
Jordan gunpi gei ka nai ciang,
Na ang muanhuai sung kong tun ciang;
Suangpi pha aw, Hong liah in.
